title: Extended Edibles
description: Extended Minecraft food using vanilla items with little to no use.
body:
# Description

This mods adds ways to eat different items that aren't edible,

such as mushrooms, eggs, and ~~nether wart~~! *not implemented yet.*

### Featuring: Edible Items!

Here are various of the edible items we've added!

> Salt Bits & Salt "Ore" | (don't do this, not even irl.)
> * Salt Bits are dropped from Salt Rocks generated in the world. 

#

> Cured & Roasted Mushrooms | (Both red and brown)
> * In a Crafting Grid, Add a Mushroom and Salt.

#

> Cooked & Boiled Eggs!
> * Cook an Egg, then 'Peel' the egg by Interacting

#

![Separator Banner, has all iterations of the two mushroom variants.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7821431f365638e23071520985f8700ca544faff.png)

### And More to Come Soon!

[KidV0lt]:

If you have any suggestion/question/problem, DM me on discord and ill probably read! U: ```kimbolocolonthree```

#

<details>
<summary>KidV0lt's QnA's</summary>


> ### Q: Will you Update This?
> * A: Yes, (probably)

 
> ### Q: Will you Backport This?
> * A: I'll try, Comment What Version do you Want me to Backport.

 
> ### Q: Can i use your mod in a modpack?
> * A: Yes, i dont even bother for credit lol

</details>

<details>
<summary>Current Mod Compatiblity</summary>
  
- Other salt's from mods that use the tag ```forge:salt```
  
- Eventually more coming soon.

</details>

_All of this was Made with MCreator & Aseprite!_
